title: It's Just Optimized
description: A Minecraft modpack that improves the performance and graphical quality of the game with mods such as Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, and others. It does not change the look or gameplay of Minecraft and is compatible with other mods.
body:
![JO logo](https://imgur.com/NMrFS7o.png)

**⚠️ Project Archived - No Longer Maintained**  
This project is now archived and will no longer receive updates or maintenance.  
For a modern, actively maintained alternative, we recommend **[Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)** - currently the best optimization modpack for Minecraft.

---

🍃**It’s Just Optimized** is a Fabric-based Minecraft modpack that focuses on improving performance and graphical quality. It includes optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight that enhance the rendering engine, light engine, and physics system. Enjoy smoother gameplay with higher FPS and fewer lighting errors while maintaining Minecraft's original look. Compatible with most Fabric mods and all worlds/servers - perfect for vanilla lovers seeking optimal performance.

## 🔥Performance

|              | Max FPS               | Min FPS              |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| Vanilla            | 1112              | 1087             |
| It's Just Optimized | 2675              | 2042             |

*Results may vary based on hardware and conditions.*

<summary>Spanish</summary>

**⚠️ Proyecto Archivado - Sin Mantenimiento**  
Este proyecto está archivado y ya no recibe actualizaciones.  
Recomendamos **[Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)** como alternativa actualizada.

🍃**It’s Just Optimized** es un modpack de Minecraft basado en Fabric que mejora rendimiento y calidad gráfica. Incluye mods como Sodium, Lithium y Starlight que optimizan el motor de renderizado, iluminación y física. Disfruta de un juego más fluido con mejor FPS sin alterar la esencia de Minecraft. Compatible con la mayoría de mods Fabric y cualquier mundo/servidor.

### 🔥Rendimiento
|              | Max FPS               | Min FPS              |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|

| It's Just Optimized | 2675              | 2042             |

Ce projet est archivé et ne sera plus mis à jour.  
Nous recommandons **[Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)** comme alternative actuelle.

🍃**It's Just Optimized** est un modpack Fabric optimisant les performances et graphismes de Minecraft. Il inclut des mods comme Sodium, Lithium et Starlight qui améliorent le moteur de rendu, l'éclairage et la physique. Profitez d'un jeu plus fluide avec un FPS accru tout en conservant l'expérience vanilla originale. Compatible avec la plupart des mods Fabric et tous les mondes/serveurs.

<summary>Portuguese</summary>

**⚠️ Projeto Arquivado - Sem Manutenção**  
Este projeto está arquivado e não receberá atualizações.  
Recomendamos **[Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)** como alternativa atual.

🍃**It's Just Optimized** é um modpack Fabric que melhora desempenho e qualidade gráfica do Minecraft. Inclui mods como Sodium, Lithium e Starlight que otimizam a renderização, iluminação e física. Tenha jogabilidade mais suave com FPS maior sem alterar a essência do jogo. Compatível com a maioria dos mods Fabric e todos os mundos/servidores.

<details>
<summary>Simplified Chinese</summary>

**⚠️ 项目已归档 - 停止维护**  
该项目已归档并不再更新。  
我们推荐 **[Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)** 作为现代替代方案。

🍃**It's Just Optimized** 是基于 Fabric 的 Minecraft 优化模组包，专注于提升性能和画质。包含 Sodium、Lithium 和 Starlight 等优化模组，可增强渲染引擎、光照系统和物理效果。在保持原版风格的同时享受更流畅的游戏体验和高帧率。兼容大多数 Fabric 模组及所有世界/服务器。
</details>

<details>
<summary>Arabic (عربي)</summary>

**⚠️ المشروع مؤرشف - بدون صيانة**  
تم أرشفة هذا المشروع ولن يتم تحديثه.  
نوصي باستخدام **[Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)** كبديل حديث.

**إنها مُحسَّنة فقط** هي حزمة تعديلات لـ Minecraft تعتمد على Fabric لتحسين الأداء والجودة البصرية. تتضمن تعديلات مثل Sodium وLithium وStarlight التي تعزز محركات العرض والإنارة والفيزياء. استمتع بأداء سلس مع معدل إطارات أعلى مع الحفاظ على الشكل الأصلي للعبة. متوافقة مع معظم تعديلات Fabric وجميع العوالم/السيرفرات.
</details>
